title: Scheduled currency-audit loop — transpose the WASC detection half (FEAT-013 detection pillar)
description: Transpose the WASC scheduled currency auditor into this project: (1) .claude/agents/context-currency-auditor.md — read-only forensic auditor; reads (never writes) tmp/context-audits/.watermark.json; missing/invalid watermark forces FULL audit, never treated as clean; fast path when baseline == HEAD with clean tree; incremental audit scoped to git log <baseline>..HEAD otherwise; check engine runs the mechanical core first (npx tsx scripts/check-context-currency.ts exit-code-parsed; pi-context context-reconcile --dryRun; pi-context context-validate) then the judgment sweep scoped to the window (bucket-lag, fired free-text stale_conditions, closure omissions — the TASK-094 class, decision-before-implementation criteria) via pi-context ops; claude-history CLI attribution per finding; impression-only findings forbidden; direct-drive discipline stated in the agent body. (2) .claude/commands/audit-context-currency.md — loop-friendly non-interactive command: dispatch auditor, persist report to tmp/context-audits/audit-<TS>.md, PushNotification iff non-clean (once, <200 chars, leads with action + report path; clean = silent), write watermark with last_clean_head = HEAD iff verdict CLEAN with findings 0 and no unverified checks, otherwise carry the prior last_clean_head forward UNCHANGED (advance-only-on-clean); non-clean report names /audit-substrate-currency as the enactment path. (3) tmp/context-audits/ watermark home (gitignored). (4) /loop 10m /audit-context-currency scheduling convention documented in CLAUDE.md. Exemplar: wasc-school-wide-improvement-plan .claude/agents/context-currency-auditor.md + .claude/commands/audit-context-currency.md, extracted 2026-07-08. Basis: analysis/2026-07-07-wasc-harness-delta-why-requisite-steps-still-optional.md (the R1-R20 derivation dropped the detection half).
acceptance_criteria: The auditor agent file exists, is read-only (writes nothing, including the watermark), forces a FULL audit on missing/invalid watermark, and runs the mechanical core (check-context-currency.ts, context-reconcile --dryRun, context-validate) before the window-scoped judgment sweep.

The command file exists, is non-interactive-safe, persists a timestamped report, notifies via PushNotification if and only if the verdict is non-clean, and advances last_clean_head if and only if the verdict is CLEAN with zero findings and no unverified checks — otherwise the prior baseline carries forward unchanged so the finding recurs next cycle.

Runtime demo: a first real run (no watermark) performs a FULL audit, writes the report and watermark; an immediate second run takes the fast path with findings 0 and no notification; a synthetic non-clean run leaves last_clean_head unchanged and fires exactly one notification; the finding recurs on the following run until cleaned.
WAIVED by user directive 2026-07-08 (recorded in VER-080): the fresh-context adversarial probe of the authored files — any future false-pass finding in them re-enters the pipeline as a new finding.
CLAUDE.md documents the /loop 10m /audit-context-currency convention in lockstep.
